raw_consumer_statement:
I disputed XXXX chargers that I did not authorized, but credit card company Barclay XXXX provided temporary credit then sent a letter saying they finished investigating and I was responsible for chargers base on few factors. 

- Credit card was physically used at the merchant, but I clearly stated card was lost/stolen. 

- XXXX wallet was used for few transactions, I never had the Credit card on my wallet never provided the XXXX address. 

- Fraud dispute was done through online app, not called them. So its suspicious.

- Fraud was done in the same state I live in, XXXX, so investigator suspect that was done by me. 

I filed the fraud dispute the same day transactions were shown on my account I clearly stated card was not on my possession. 

Now they seeking money back for it. {$520.00}. 
Which I did not authorized.
